case_title: HAYES VALLEY PROPERTIES vs. ANTONETTY, ALVIN "DUTCH" et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HAYES VALLEY PROPERTIES AS TO DEFENDANT ANTONETTY, ALVIN "DUTCH" DOES 1-10, IN OCCUPANCY SUMMONS ISSUED
AMENDED NOTICE OF RULING ON DEMURRER FILED BY PLAINTIFF
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 302, MOTION TO ENFORCE JUDGMENT, STIPULATED JUDGMENT, ETC. CONTINUED FROM FEB-23-2000 TO FEB-24-2000 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: LOFDAHL, NANCY E. SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR ANGELHART, DUTCH (SUED AS ALVIN "DUTCH"ANTONETTY)
NOTICE OF UNAVAILABILTY OF COUNSEL\ 9/28/99-- 14-OCT-99 FILED BY PLAINTIFF HAYES VALLEY PROPERTIES

(CONT'D FROM ABOVE) HENCE, REQUEST FOR PUNITIVES IS DENIED. THE MOTION TO ENFORCE THE STIPULATION IS GRANTED BECAUSE THE ACCOUNTING & SECURITY WERE NOT PROVIDED TO DEFENDANT WITHIN THE STATUTORY TIME FRAME. HOWEVER PLAINTIFF MAY SEEK DAMAGES IN A SEPARATE ACTION FOR THE PAINT SPILL & WATER DAMAGE. FINALLY, PURSUANT TO THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT THE COURT FINDS THE MOVING PARTY TO BE THE PREVAILING PARTY & AWARDS $300.00 AS REASONABLE ATTORNEY FEES. DEFENDANT TO PREPARE ORDER.
